Id1.text: Christmas pudding is an ingredient in the dessert Baked Alaska. Cookie is also a dessert.

Id2.text: A cookie can be a dessert, as can baked alaska which has christmas pudding as an ingredient.

Id3.text: Cookies are a dessert item, as is Baked Alaska that has Christmas pudding as one of its ingredients.
